title.ar: الدعاء إذا أفطر عند أهل بيت
title.en: Invocation for a family who invites you to break your fast with them

items.arabicText: ((أَفْطَرَ عِنْدَكُمُ الصَّائِمُونَ، وَأَكَلَ طَعَامَكُمُ الْأَبْرَارُ، وَصَلَّتْ عَلَيْكُمُ الْمَلاَئِكَةُ)).

translations.en: (May the fasting break their fast in your home, and may the dutiful and pious eat your food, and may the angles send prayers upon you.)
